query: 明天松门厂区会不会下雨？我上班需不需要带伞？
answer_points: This is a realtime/forecast weather question about the 松门 (Songmen) site that is genuinely absent from the Fuling knowledge base — the KB holds internal SOPs/HR/customs/marketing docs, not a meteorological forecast service.
No active chunk answers it: 下雨/带伞/降雨/umbrella/weather/forecast all returned 0 active-chunk hits in chunk_meta.

The only 天气/气象/预报/台风/暴雨 hits are typhoon & disaster emergency-response SOPs (防抗台风应急响应, 应急预案, 风灾前的预报), interview-script templates ('今天天气很热'), and customs '预报关' (pre-declaration) homonyms — none provides a daily rain/umbrella forecast.
All 松门 hits are emergency-contact directory entries (松门医院, 保安室电话), and 松门 ∩ (weather/rain/umbrella) co-occurrence = 0 active chunks.

Correct behavior: the system should NOT_RESULT / refuse to fabricate a forecast and tell the user this is outside the knowledge base (check a weather app/service), rather than hallucinate from typhoon-SOP chunks.
